parameters.query:
INSERT INTO workflow_locks (lock_key, owner_id, workflow_name, acquired_at, heartbeat_at, expires_at, metadata)
VALUES (
  'facebook_automation_main',
  '{{ $json.cycle_owner }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $json.workflow_name }}',
  NOW(),
  NOW(),
  NOW() + (('{{ $json.lock_timeout }} seconds')::interval),
  jsonb_build_object('triggered_at', '{{ $json.triggered_at }}')
)
ON CONFLICT (lock_key)
DO UPDATE SET
  owner_id = EXCLUDED.owner_id,
  workflow_name = EXCLUDED.workflow_name,
  acquired_at = NOW(),
  heartbeat_at = NOW(),
  expires_at = NOW() + (('{{ $json.lock_timeout }} seconds')::interval),
  metadata = workflow_locks.metadata || EXCLUDED.metadata
WHERE workflow_locks.expires_at <= NOW()
RETURNING lock_key, owner_id, workflow_name, expires_at;

SELECT p.id, p.page_name, p.page_niche, p.language, p.tone, p.page_id, p.page_access_token, p.drive_folder_id, p.drive_folder_name, p.cooldown_hours, p.stagger_seconds, p.last_posted_at, p.platform_targets, p.metadata
FROM pages p
WHERE p.active = TRUE
ORDER BY COALESCE(p.last_posted_at, TIMESTAMPTZ '1970-01-01') ASC, p.page_name ASC;

parameters.name: q
parameters.value: ='{{ $items("Postgres (load pages)").map(item => item.json.drive_folder_id).filter((v, i, a) => a.indexOf(v) === i).map(id => "'" + id + "' in parents").join(" or ") }}' and trashed = false'

parameters.query:
WITH cycle AS (
  INSERT INTO workflow_cycles (workflow_name, status, total_pages_targeted, total_pages_posted, total_pages_failed, metadata)
  VALUES (
    '{{ $json.workflow_name }}',
    '{{ $json.image ? 'running' : 'skipped' }}',
    1,
    CASE WHEN '{{ $json.body?.id || $json.id || '' }}' <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
    CASE WHEN '{{ $json.body?.id || $json.id || '' }}' <> '' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
    jsonb_build_object('cycle_owner', '{{ $json.cycle_owner }}')
  )
  RETURNING id
), post_row AS (
  INSERT INTO posts (
    workflow_cycle_id, page_id, media_asset_id, platform, external_post_id, status, caption_text,
    request_payload, response_payload, error_code, error_message, attempt_count, posted_at
  )
  VALUES (
    (SELECT id FROM cycle),
    '{{ $json.page.id }}'::uuid,
    COALESCE((SELECT id FROM media_assets WHERE drive_file_id = '{{ $json.image?.drive_file_id || '' }}'), NULL),
    'facebook',
    '{{ $json.body?.id || $json.id || '' }}',
    CASE WHEN '{{ $json.body?.id || $json.id || '' }}' <> '' THEN 'success' ELSE 'failure' END,
    $n8n$ {{ $json.caption_payload.final_caption_text }} $n8n$,
    jsonb_build_object('image_url', '{{ $json.image?.source_url || '' }}'),
    '{{ JSON.stringify($json) }}'::jsonb,
    '{{ $json.error?.code || $json.body?.error?.code || '' }}',
    $n8n$ {{ $json.error?.message || $json.body?.error?.message || '' }} $n8n$,
    1,
    CASE WHEN '{{ $json.body?.id || $json.id || '' }}' <> '' THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END
  )
  RETURNING id, workflow_cycle_id
)
INSERT INTO page_media_history (page_id, media_asset_id, workflow_cycle_id, post_id, assigned_at, posted_at, status)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.page.id }}'::uuid,
  COALESCE((SELECT id FROM media_assets WHERE drive_file_id = '{{ $json.image?.drive_file_id || '' }}'), NULL),
  (SELECT workflow_cycle_id FROM post_row),
  (SELECT id FROM post_row),
  NOW(),
  CASE WHEN '{{ $json.body?.id || $json.id || '' }}' <> '' THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END,
  CASE WHEN '{{ $json.body?.id || $json.id || '' }}' <> '' THEN 'posted' ELSE 'failed' END
)
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

DELETE FROM workflow_locks
WHERE lock_key = 'facebook_automation_main'
  AND owner_id = '{{ $('Code (selection logic)').first().json.cycle_owner }}'::uuid
RETURNING lock_key;
